meta.description: Canonical qualification matrices for LAWIM — all 107 matrix types catalogued with complete field specifications for 75 entries

matrices.description: Qualification matrix for a basic single room (chambre simple) rental search. A chambre simple is the most basic residential unit — a single room without internal private bathroom or kitchen.
